LanguageData.FGL_TextureResizingExplanation: Some mods may contain a lot of high-res textures that take a long time to load. Use this to downscale hi-res textures. Original files will NOT be modified; downscaled versions are stored in a separate cache and loaded automatically on next startup. Following textures will be reduced down to target size: Building - 256px Pawn - 256px Apparel - 128px Weapon - 128px Item - 128px Plant - 128px Tree - 256px Terrain - 1024px
LanguageData.FGL_DownscaleTexturesConfirmation: Perform texture downscaling? Downscaled textures will be cached separately; original mod files will not be modified.(requires restart once)
LanguageData.FGL_ClearTextureCacheConfirmation: Clear all cached downscaled textures? Original textures will be used on next startup.
LanguageData.FGL_TextureCacheStatus_Empty: Texture cache is empty. No textures have been downscaled.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_RedirectHugslibFailed: Failed to redirect HugsLib OnDefsLoaded execution (HugsLib version might be incompatible):
LanguageData.FGL_Log_BackgroundStartupUnexpectedExcep: Unexpected exception in background startup completion task
LanguageData.FGL_Log_LongEventHandlerScheduleFailed: Error scheduling startup completion actions in LongEventHandler
LanguageData.FGL_Log_PreloadAllTypesUnexpectedExcepti: Unexpected exception preloading all types cache in background: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedCompileFGLProgressReporter: Failed to compile fast delegate for FGLProgressReporter pause field: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedToStartAsyncXMLScan: Failed to start asynchronous XML file scan: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_StaticAtlasesLoadedFromCache: Static atlases loaded from cache (Raw DXT bytes)
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AdaptiveBakeFailedFallback: Adaptive bake failed, falling back to vanilla static atlas baking
LanguageData.FGL_Log_StartingDeferredVanillaStaticAtl: Starting deferred vanilla static atlas baking
LanguageData.FGL_Log_DeferredVanillaStaticAtlasBaking: Deferred vanilla static atlas baking complete
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AlienRacesDetectedRescanSchedule: Alien Races detected, scheduling extended graphics rescan after loading
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AlienRacesRescanComplete: Alien Races extended graphics rescan complete
LanguageData.FGL_Log_XmlCacheInvalidatedNewHashSaved: XML cache invalidated and new hash saved to settings on main thread.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedToSaveXmlHash: Failed to save updated XML combined hash: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_EarlyLoadingFailedWillRetry: Early loading failed for {0}, will retry in normal flow:
LanguageData.FGL_Log_StaticAtlasesLoadedFromCacheSync: Static atlases loaded from cache (Raw DXT bytes) - Synchronous
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AdaptiveBakeFailedFallbackSync: Adaptive bake failed, falling back to vanilla static atlas baking - Synchronous
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ErrorSyncStaticAtlasBaking: Error during synchronous static atlas baking: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_TranspilerNoApplyCallFound: StaticTextureAtlas_ApplyTextureCompression_Patch: Transpiler found no Apply(bool,bool) call to replace. The patch may be broken due to a game update — atlas cache write-back may fail.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_CacheLoadErrorFallback: Cache load error, falling back to vanilla atlas baking: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AtlasCacheBuildQueueMissingKey: Atlas cache: buildQueue does not contain key (group={0}, hasMask={1}). Cache entry skipped.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AtlasCacheTextureMissingFromBuil: Atlas cache: texture missing from buildQueue during cache load (key={0}, name={1}). Cache entry skipped.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AtlasCacheTextureCountMismatch: Atlas cache: texture count ({0}) != uvRects count ({1}) for group={2}. Cache entry skipped.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedToBuildMeshesForAtlasGroup: Failed to build meshes for atlas group {0}: {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AtlasCacheFileTruncatedColor: Atlas cache file truncated for {0}: expected at least {1} bytes, got {2}. Skipping cache entry.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_AtlasCacheFileTruncatedMask: Atlas cache file truncated for {0}: expected at least {1} bytes, got {2}. Skipping cache entry.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ErrorGettingRawBytesColor: Error getting raw bytes for color atlas: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ErrorGettingRawBytesMask: Error getting raw bytes for mask atlas: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedToMakeColorAtlasTextureNon: Failed to make color atlas texture non-readable: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedToMakeMaskAtlasTextureNonR: Failed to make mask atlas texture non-readable: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FallbackToRenderTextureForTex: Cannot read raw texture data directly, falling back to RenderTexture for: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_TextureDownscaleCacheHits: Texture downscale cache hits: {0}, failures: {1}, configured entries: {2}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ErrorLoadingTextureMainThreadRed: Error loading texture on main thread redirect: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_TimeoutWaitingTextureLoadMainThr: Timeout waiting for texture loading on main thread: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_IOExceptionCacheKeyForPath: IOException when getting cache key for: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_UnauthorizedAccessExceptionCache: UnauthorizedAccessException when getting cache key for: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_IOExceptionCheckFreshness: IOException checking cache freshness for: {0} and {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_UnauthorizedAccessExceptionCheck: UnauthorizedAccessException checking cache freshness for: {0} and {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedCleanStagingDir: Failed to clean up staging directory: {0} error: {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedReplaceTextureCacheDirFall: Failed to replace texture cache directory. Falling back.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedDeleteObsoleteCacheFile: Failed to delete obsolete cache file {0}: {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_FailedDeleteUnreferencedCacheFil: Failed to delete unreferenced cache file {0}: {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_CacheCleanupSummary: Cache cleanup completed. Removed {0} obsolete cache map entries, deleted {1} obsolete files and {2} unreferenced files.
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ErrorObsoleteCacheCleanupGeneral: Error during obsolete cache files cleanup: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_TextureDownscaleFailedKeepingCac: Texture downscale failed, keeping previous cache:
LanguageData.FGL_Log_CannotLoadOriginalTextureFromDis: Cannot load original texture from disk, using in-memory copy:
LanguageData.FGL_Log_TextureDownscaleSummary: Texture downscale summary: resized={0}, sourcePixels={1}, downscaledPixels={2}, estimatedSaved={3}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_DestroyImmediateFailedFallback: DestroyImmediate failed, falling back to Destroy: {0}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ParallelLoadXmlAssetFailedForMod: Failed to load XML asset in parallel for Mod {0} (File: {1}): {2}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ParallelXmlLoadingFailedFallback: Parallel XML loading failed for Mod {0}, falling back to vanilla loader: {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_XmlScanCompleteHashes: XML scan complete. Combined content hash: {0}, last saved hash: {1}
LanguageData.FGL_Log_ErrorBackgroundXmlScan: Error during background XML file scan: {0}
